title: Magical Creamy Canadian Cheese Pancakes
description: A fermented, creamy, and adventurous Canadian dish featuring baking powder and ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, these pancakes are a unique breakfast treat. They combine the richness of cheese with the fluffiness of pancakes.

ingredients.name: fermented cheese
ingredients.notes: such as Canadian feta or goat cheese

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the fermented cheese, plain yogurt, eggs, and milk.
Add the melted butter to the wet ingredients and whisk until combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined, being careful not to overmix.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
